tweets.text:
While Texas Department of Public Safety and ICE cleared an operation at Colony Ridge housing development near Houston, DPS got a call about a homicide in the city. Law enforcement identified an MS-13 gang member with a prior removal as the murder suspect. ICE Houston’s special agents helped DPS apprehend the suspect.

💻Watch for more details at https://t.co/CMSYsdqSDN.

card.name: summary
card.title: ICE expands detention capacity with Delaney Hall Facility in New Jersey
card.description: The facility will expand ICE’s detention capacity in the Northeast, enhancing the agency’s ability to manage the region’s growing enforcement and removal operations.

tweets.text:
ICE arrested Juan Antonio Reyes after he attempted to purchase a firearm. @ATFHQ denied his purchase and alerted us of the attempt.

An immigration judge granted his request of voluntary departure in lieu of removal decades ago, but he didn’t honor the deal he requested. Instead, he stayed in the U.S. illegally.

His history of arrests includes charges of forgery and filing a false public record.

💻Learn more about his case in our newsroom.

tweets.text:
ICE led a multi-agency enforcement operation in the Colony Ridge development north of Houston known for its cartel activity and illegal alien population.

The operation resulted in:
→118 arrests

🔍Charges and convictions of those arrested include criminal sexual conduct, homicide, theft, negligent manslaughter, child sexual abuse, crimes of moral turpitude, weapons offenses and drug offenses.

tweets.text:
South Texas man pleads guilty to smuggling 36 illegal aliens in tractor trailer after ICE and @CBP Border Patrol probe: https://t.co/yzNIYmTezF

“The days of transnational criminal organizations raking in billions in illicit profits … by trampling on our nation’s sovereignty and flooding (it) with millions of unvetted aliens … are over.” —ICE Houston Special Agent in Charge Chad Plantz
